description: Referee blame after loss — risk phrases fully removed, topic retained
input: The refs completely robbed us tonight. That last call was absolute garbage and cost us the game.

potentialHeadlines: Star player blasts refs after loss

call2_translation: We're disappointed with how the game ended. There were some calls we disagreed with, but we need to focus on our own execution going forward.

description: Teammate criticism — risk phrases removed but topic retained
input: Honestly, some guys on this team just don't want to put in the work. They're lazy and it shows.

flaggedPhrases: don't want to put in the work
potentialHeadlines: Player calls teammates lazy in shocking rant

call2_translation: We're working on building a stronger collective effort. Everyone needs to raise their level of commitment, and I include myself in that.

description: Contract dispute — risk phrases removed, topic retained
input: I'm underpaid and disrespected by this organization. They don't value me at all.

potentialHeadlines: Player demands trade after calling team disrespectful

call2_translation: My focus is on performing at the highest level. Contract discussions are handled privately between my representatives and the organization.

description: Injury excuse — risk phrases removed, topic retained
input: I've been playing hurt for weeks and nobody cares. The training staff is incompetent.

potentialHeadlines: Player slams training staff as incompetent

call2_translation: I've been managing some physical challenges, and I'm working closely with our medical team to get back to full strength.

description: Coach criticism — risk phrases removed, topic retained
input: The coach has no idea what he's doing. His game plans are a joke and we're all suffering for it.
call2_translation: We're in a challenging stretch and we're working through our system together. I have full confidence in our coaching staff's process.

description: FAIL — flagged phrase 'robbed' still present in translation
input: The refs robbed us of a win tonight.
call2_translation: We feel we were robbed of a fair outcome tonight, but we'll move on.

description: Trade demand — risk phrases removed, topic retained
input: I want out of here. This city and this team are holding me back from winning a championship.

potentialHeadlines: Superstar demands trade in bombshell statement

call2_translation: I'm fully committed to this team right now. My goal is to compete for a championship, and I believe we can build toward that here.

description: Gambling reference — risk phrases removed, topic retained
input: I bet on myself every single game. Sometimes I literally put money on it.

potentialHeadlines: Player hints at gambling on own games

call2_translation: I have complete confidence in my abilities and I approach every game with full commitment and intensity.

description: FAIL — topic keyword missing from translation
input: Our defense was terrible tonight. We gave up way too many easy baskets.
call2_translation: We have areas to improve and we'll address them in practice this week.

description: Opponent disrespect — risk phrases removed, topic retained
input: That team is trash. We should have beaten them by 30 and we let them hang around.

potentialHeadlines: Player calls rival team trash ahead of rematch

call2_translation: We respect every opponent we face. Tonight we didn't execute the way we're capable of, and that's on us.

description: Substance reference — risk phrases removed, topic retained
input: I needed a drink after that loss. Maybe a few drinks. It was that bad.

potentialHeadlines: Athlete jokes about drinking after tough loss

call2_translation: That was a tough loss and we're all feeling it. We'll regroup, watch film, and come back stronger.

description: FAIL — flagged phrase 'lazy' still present in translation
input: Some players on this roster are just lazy and don't deserve to be here.

potentialHeadlines: Player calls teammates lazy in locker room bombshell

call2_translation: We need more effort from everyone. Some guys have been lazy in practice and it's affecting our games.
